explanatory_strength.rationale: The market-structure discount on a levered ETH wrapper is a specific mechanism with filing-backed look-through math, but the dilution-versus-beta path is not yet hard to vary.

evidence_sufficiency.rationale: May 31 ETH inventory and share count are primary-verified, while post-May ATM issuance, preferred waterfall, live spot versus marks, and treasury-vehicle comparables remain open.

downside_control.rationale: Price sits below May ETH fair value per share, but unbounded dilution, G&A burn above staking revenue, and an unmodeled preferred reserve leave the low case near $8.50 per share.

return_vs_alternatives.rationale: Base 6.3% per year is well below a mid-teens hurdle; bull 15.1% requires favorable ETH beta with limited further dilution.

claims.claim: May 31 filing ETH look-through (~$18.76 per share) exceeds price ($15.69), giving a scarce-asset cushion, but that cushion is not a bounded common claim once ATM dilution and preferred seniority are applied.

The eth_trajectory_net_dilution additive row (+$4.50 base) lacks explicit success probability, post-May issuance reconciliation, and arm's-length comparable treasury transactions before incremental ETH beta can be treated as non-overlapping value.
Nine-month general and administrative expense ($335.7M) exceeds staking revenue ($56.9M), so per-share ETH accumulation depends on continued equity issuance rather than self-funded owner economics.

strongest_counter_explanation: The discount to May ETH marks is a rational price for an equity-financed dilution vehicle: management funds token purchases by issuing shares faster than ETH per share compounds, so the scarce asset on balance sheet does not translate into a fixed pro-rata common claim.
most_important_missing_fact: Post-May 2026 ATM share issuance and ETH-per-diluted-share reconciled to BMNP preferred conversion and warrant waterfall.
falsifiers: Reconcile quarter-by-quarter ETH purchases, shares issued, and ETH per diluted share from May 31, 2026 forward.
Model BMNP preferred and warrant claims as explicit per-share deductions before promoting static look-through to a downside floor.
Tie eth_trajectory base case to observed issuance cadence rather than assumed 10% cumulative dilution.
specialist_findings: Scarce-asset read: the filing ETH stack is real and overlap keys are documented, but the wrapper fails durable-payoff tests until dilution pace and senior claims are proven; abstain from approve.
